finding: AudioRenderCapacity can expose render load and underrun evidence, but unsupported or unobserved telemetry must remain unresolved rather than being classified as healthy audio.

verification.result: 6 assertions passed in an isolated Node runtime using byte-identical committed source and test content

limits: The cited API is a draft and implementation support may vary.
A healthy capacity sample does not prove sound reached the physical output device.
A single sample does not establish historical or future playback health.
The classifier does not diagnose the cause of render pressure.
falsification_route: Run the classifier against retained browser samples from supported user agents and reject the design if unsupported, malformed, or pressure-bearing samples are ever promoted to healthy evidence.
